title: Available Payment Instrument
description: An instrument type available from a payment handler with optional constraints.

type.description: The instrument type identifier (e.g., 'card', 'gift_card'). References an instrument schema's type constant.

billing_address.description: Constraint on the instrument's `billing_address` field. The address itself is required only when `billing_address` appears in this object's `required_fields`.

constraints.description: Constraints on this instrument type. Base payment instrument constraints can require and describe `billing_address`; concrete instrument schemas SHOULD add instrument-specific constraint keys while remaining open to extensions.
